title: Oh shucks, here comes Patrick
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Patrick Sibeko of the...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Patrick Sibeko of the Featherbed Company shucked his way to the top prize at the Knysna Oyster Festival cooking and shucking competition on Tuesday evening, 8 July.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Patrick Sibeko of the Featherbed Company shucked his way to the top prize at the Knysna Oyster Festival cooking and shucking competition on Tuesday evening, 8 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He presented judges Keith Davis and Andrew Korki with 12 perfect oysters in one minute."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Patrick worked for the Knysna Oyster company between 1995 and 2013 – before joining the Featherbed Company where he is now kitchen manager.","html":"Patrick worked for the Knysna Oyster company between 1995 and 2013 – before joining the Featherbed Company where he is now kitchen manager."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Patrick showed that, even though he has other duties, he can still expertly shuck an oyster.","html":"Patrick showed that, even though he has other duties, he can still expertly shuck an oyster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His trick: \"I open them from the hinge, so that the shells don't break, not like the others who open an oyster from the mouth.\"","html":"His trick: \"I open them from the hinge, so that the shells don't break, not like the others who open an oyster from the mouth.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"To see Patrick in action, visit our TikTok Channel for a VIDEO here."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CriteriaHe estimates he has, over the years, shucked more than a million oysters.","html":"Criteria
He estimates he has, over the years, shucked more than a million oysters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The judging criteria were for a clean, open oyster, with no shell inside the opened oyster.","html":"The judging criteria were for a clean, open oyster, with no shell inside the opened oyster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Also, that no flesh is left on the shell.","html":"Also, that no flesh is left on the shell."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The winners of the best-dressed stand was Featherbed Company.","html":"The winners of the best-dressed stand was Featherbed Company."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The best-dressed oyster was produced by Simola, with Butterfly Blue second and 34 De-grees South third.","html":"The best-dressed oyster was produced by Simola, with Butterfly Blue second and 34 De-grees South third."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Number one and number two...Patrick Sibeko (right), who came first in the oyster shucking competition, and Tollman Dyani, the runner-up. Patrick was a clear winner after the first two rounds with 12 oysters to his credit, while there was a \"shuck-off\" between three other contestants that Tollman won. Photo: Chris van Gass","html":"Number one and number two...Patrick Sibeko (right), who came first in the oyster shucking competition, and Tollman Dyani, the runner-up. Patrick was a clear winner after the first two rounds with 12 oysters to his credit, while there was a \"shuck-off\" between three other contestants that Tollman won. Photo: Chris van Gass"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
